text:
piqué, woven fabric with a raised rib, often in a diamond or honeycomb pattern, usually of cotton, also known as pique, waffle piqué, waffle pique. Attributes include: 
- subclass of: "woven fabric"
- Commons category: "Piqué (textile)"
- described by source: "Brockhaus and Efron Encyclopedic Dictionary"
- made from material: "cotton",
 "synthetic fiber"
